name: trxsh
description: A modern trash CLI manager for Linux with restore capabilities, FZF integration, and permanent deletion. Never lose files again.

name: vesper.nvim
description: A dark, elegant Neovim colorscheme inspired by the evening sky. Carefully crafted colors for extended coding sessions.

name: nix-envs
description: Declarative development environments using Nix flakes. Reproducible shells for various programming languages and tools.
